notes: Designed for short-form guidance cards, results pages, and export/share cards.
Tone target: calm, mystical, feminine, screenshot-worthy, easy to understand.
Use quote as the primary share line. Use sign_name as a light label, not the main headline.
v2: 64 core card quotes manually tightened for stronger screenshot/share feel.
Round 2 human refinement: stronger screenshot-worthy main lines with higher emotional precision.
Round 3 art-direction pass: weakest names and lines tightened for stronger emotional precision and cleaner social-share feel.
V5: added high-hit priority 16 pool for blank/short inputs so early results skew stronger and prettier.

negative_types.label: Pressure
negative_types.prompt: What would you like the Eye to take away?

negative_types.label: Overthinking
negative_types.prompt: What would you like the Eye to take away?

negative_types.label: Self-doubt
negative_types.prompt: What would you like the Eye to take away?

negative_types.label: Exhaustion
negative_types.prompt: What would you like the Eye to take away?

negative_types.label: Loneliness
negative_types.prompt: What would you like the Eye to take away?

negative_types.label: Anger
negative_types.prompt: What would you like the Eye to take away?

negative_types.label: Avoidance
negative_types.prompt: What would you like the Eye to take away?

negative_types.label: Confusion
negative_types.prompt: What would you like the Eye to take away?

cards.quote: When the pressure gets specific, your body stops treating everything like danger.
cards.today_move: Choose one practical move.
cards.quote_original: Less pressure leaves more room for your real next step.

cards.quote: Your body is ready to settle before your thoughts are.
cards.today_move: Put both feet on the floor for one full minute.
cards.quote_original: A quieter body will tell you what your mind has been missing.

cards.quote: You do not need more proof to take up your place.
cards.today_move: Say one thing you know for sure.
cards.quote_original: You do not need more proof to stand where you already are.

cards.quote: Rest is not a delay. It is your system returning to itself.
cards.today_move: Cancel one nonessential thing tonight.
cards.quote_original: Rest is not falling behind. It is how your strength returns.

cards.quote: You do not owe clarity before you feel steady.
cards.today_move: Text one safe person.
cards.quote_original: You are allowed to steady yourself before you explain yourself.

cards.quote: The heat can leave without your strength leaving with it.
cards.today_move: Take one slow breath before you answer anything.
cards.quote_original: What softens first is not your power. It is the heat around it.

cards.quote: One small move can calm more than another day of bracing.
cards.today_move: Start with the smallest unfinished detail.
cards.quote_original: When you stop dodging the task, your nervous system stops running too.

cards.quote: The right path often feels quieter than the panic around it.
cards.today_move: Drink water, then pick one simple next step.
cards.quote_original: The path does not need to be loud to be true.

cards.quote: Not everything in front of you deserves the same urgency.
cards.today_move: Write your next step in one sentence.
cards.quote_original: The pressure clears when you stop treating every task as equally urgent.

cards.quote: The answer gets easier to hear when the spiral gets quieter.
cards.today_move: Silence one distraction for ten minutes.
cards.quote_original: A quieter mind makes the right thing easier to hear.

cards.quote: Fear can sound convincing without being true.
cards.today_move: Name the real question, not the loud one.
cards.quote_original: Your voice gets clearer when it is not arguing with fear.

cards.quote: A tired mind turns everything into a harder question.
cards.today_move: Step away from the screen for a short reset.
cards.quote_original: Clarity often arrives after rest, not before it.

cards.quote: What feels impossible alone often becomes clear out loud.
cards.today_move: Tell one person what you actually need.
cards.quote_original: The truth becomes easier to name when you feel less alone.

cards.quote: A clear answer will do more than a sharp reaction.
cards.today_move: Delay your reply until your body feels calm.
cards.quote_original: Clear sight is stronger than a sharp reaction.

cards.quote: What you face becomes information. What you avoid becomes fog.
cards.today_move: Open the task you have been postponing.
cards.quote_original: What you avoid gets blurrier. What you face gets simpler.

cards.quote: You already know more than panic is letting you trust.
cards.today_move: Choose one answer and follow it for one hour.
cards.quote_original: You already know more than the noise is telling you.

cards.quote: You do not have to stay braced to stay responsible.
cards.today_move: Dim one light earlier tonight.
cards.quote_original: Even the urgent mind softens when it is finally allowed to land.

cards.quote: Tonight does not need to become a courtroom in your head.
cards.today_move: Put your phone down ten minutes sooner.
cards.quote_original: You do not have to solve tonight to feel safe tonight.

cards.quote: Rest first. The real answer will still be there tomorrow.
cards.today_move: Lie down without trying to be productive.
cards.quote_original: Rest makes room for a steadier yes tomorrow.

cards.quote: Your body has been asking you to stop more gently than your thoughts have.
cards.today_move: Take a warm shower or wash your face slowly.
cards.quote_original: Your body has been asking more gently than your thoughts.

cards.quote: Rest lands more easily when you stop bracing alone.
cards.today_move: Send one simple goodnight text.
cards.quote_original: Rest is easier to receive when you let someone be near the edge of it.

cards.quote: A slower pace will protect more than a harsher tone tonight.
cards.today_move: Unclench your shoulders before the next thing.
cards.quote_original: A softer pace protects more than a harsh reaction does.

cards.quote: The task can wait longer than your nervous system should have to.
cards.today_move: Leave one task unfinished on purpose.
cards.quote_original: The task will still be there. Your nervous system does not have to stay on duty.

cards.quote: You are not failing. You are flooded.
cards.today_move: Lower the volume around you.
cards.quote_original: You are not behind. You are overloaded.

cards.quote: Pressure sounds urgent. It does not know you better than you do.
cards.today_move: Back one decision you already made.
cards.quote_original: You do not need more pressure to become more convincing.

cards.quote: You do not need one more loop to know what matters.
cards.today_move: Write down one thing you were right about.
cards.quote_original: You already know what deserves your attention.

cards.quote: Self-trust begins where extra reassurance stops running the show.
cards.today_move: Choose without asking for extra reassurance.
cards.quote_original: Self-trust grows when you stop outsourcing every answer.

cards.quote: Your body has been telling the truth long before your mind agreed.
cards.today_move: Protect one hour for yourself.
cards.quote_original: Your body knows the cost of pushing past its own no.

cards.quote: The right people will not make honesty feel unsafe.
cards.today_move: Say what you mean in one short message.
cards.quote_original: The right connection will not punish your honesty.

cards.quote: You do not need volume to prove what is true.
cards.today_move: Lower your voice instead of raising it.
cards.quote_original: Strength is clearer than anger today.

cards.quote: Confidence grows the moment your hand touches the thing.
cards.today_move: Begin before you feel fully ready.
cards.quote_original: Confidence grows when you touch the task instead of circling it.

cards.quote: A calm choice deserves more trust than a dramatic one.
cards.today_move: Take the next step without rewriting it three times.
cards.quote_original: You can trust a calm decision more than a dramatic one.

cards.quote: Pressure makes closeness feel expensive. Softness makes it possible again.
cards.today_move: Ask for help in one sentence.
cards.quote_original: Connection feels safer when pressure is not leading the room.

cards.quote: You do not have to explain yourself perfectly to be understood.
cards.today_move: Reply to one person without overediting.
cards.quote_original: You do not have to explain every thought to be understood.

cards.quote: Being seen begins the moment you stop overediting yourself.
cards.today_move: Share one honest feeling with someone safe.
cards.quote_original: Being seen starts with showing up as you are.

cards.quote: Closeness feels possible again when your body is not in survival mode.
cards.today_move: Send a soft check-in text.
cards.quote_original: Softness is easier to feel when your body is not running on empty.

cards.quote: One honest reach can change the whole temperature of a day.
cards.today_move: Invite one small conversation.
cards.quote_original: One honest reach can change the shape of a whole day.

cards.quote: Speak from the hurt underneath, not the heat on top.
cards.today_move: Use fewer sharp words today.
cards.quote_original: Speak from the wound less, from the truth more.

cards.quote: Reaching out ends more spirals than disappearing ever does.
cards.today_move: Answer the message you have been postponing.
cards.quote_original: Reaching out ends more spirals than avoiding ever does.

cards.quote: The right person does not need your polished version to stay.
cards.today_move: Sit near someone you trust.
cards.quote_original: The right person does not need a perfect version of you.

cards.quote: Money gets clearer the moment panic stops running the room.
cards.today_move: Check one number only.
cards.quote_original: Steadier money begins with one clean practical move.

cards.quote: Not every money thought deserves a full-body emergency.
cards.today_move: Open your notes and list one expense clearly.
cards.quote_original: Not every thought about money deserves your full body reaction.

cards.quote: Your value is not shrinking with your balance.
cards.today_move: Name one skill that already creates value.
cards.quote_original: Your value is not clarified by self-criticism.

cards.quote: Rested thinking makes cleaner money decisions than stress ever will.
cards.today_move: Pause one unnecessary purchase tonight.
cards.quote_original: Rested thinking spends and decides more cleanly.

cards.quote: Money feels heavier when you believe you have to carry it alone.
cards.today_move: Ask one practical question about work or pay.
cards.quote_original: Support helps your resources stretch further than isolation does.

cards.quote: A calmer nervous system makes a sharper money move.
cards.today_move: Wait before any reactive spending.
cards.quote_original: A calmer tone creates better money decisions than a heated one.

cards.quote: What you look at becomes workable. What you avoid becomes larger.
cards.today_move: Open the bill, email, or task you have delayed.
cards.quote_original: What you avoid grows fog. What you review grows power.

cards.quote: You do not need a miracle first. You need one clear move.
cards.today_move: Choose one money task and finish only that.
cards.quote_original: You do not need a bigger rush. You need a clearer plan.

cards.quote: A boundary makes pressure measurable instead of endless.
cards.today_move: Say no to one extra thing.
cards.quote_original: Pressure makes everything feel personal. Boundaries make it measurable.

cards.quote: Stop overexplaining the edge you already feel in your body.
cards.today_move: End one explanation early.
cards.quote_original: You are easier to hear when you stop overexplaining your edge.

cards.quote: A real limit does not need to be defended all day.
cards.today_move: Name one limit without apologizing.
cards.quote_original: A boundary does not need to be proven to be real.

cards.quote: Your no is how your rest survives.
cards.today_move: Protect tonight from one extra demand.
cards.quote_original: Rest gets protected the moment your no gets cleaner.

cards.quote: You are allowed to want closeness without abandoning your edges.
cards.today_move: Reply later instead of right away.
cards.quote_original: Closeness and self-protection can exist in the same room.

cards.quote: Distance can be kinder than heat today.
cards.today_move: Step back before you answer.
cards.quote_original: Distance can be kinder than heat today.

cards.quote: Naming the line will clear more than vague stress ever could.
cards.today_move: Close one open loop you do not want to carry.
cards.quote_original: Leaving the task vague keeps the stress close. Naming the edge clears it.

cards.quote: A clear no protects more than a rushed yes.
cards.today_move: Choose the calmer boundary.
cards.quote_original: A clear limit protects more than a rushed yes.

cards.quote: Momentum starts when pressure becomes one real move.
cards.today_move: Do the first two minutes now.
cards.quote_original: Momentum returns when the pressure breaks into one real action.

cards.quote: The first step shows up when the noise stops pretending to be guidance.
cards.today_move: Set a ten-minute timer and begin.
cards.quote_original: Thinking less about the whole thing helps the first move appear.

cards.quote: Action builds belief faster than self-criticism ever will.
cards.today_move: Choose the easier version and start there.
cards.quote_original: Action builds confidence faster than self-criticism ever will.

cards.quote: You do not need speed. You need a start soft enough to survive.
cards.today_move: Get up and do one small physical reset.
cards.quote_original: You do not need speed. You need a beginning.

cards.quote: Support still counts as movement.
cards.today_move: Body-double with someone for one task.
cards.quote_original: Moving with someone safe can count as movement too.

cards.quote: Put the fire into the task, not the reaction.
cards.today_move: Put the energy into the task, not the feeling.
cards.quote_original: A focused action is stronger than an emotional surge.

cards.quote: What you start gets smaller. So does the fear around it.
cards.today_move: Open the thing you keep avoiding and touch it once.
cards.quote_original: What you start shrinks what you fear.

cards.quote: One clear move will beat ten frantic ones every time.
cards.today_move: Pick one priority and move it forward.
cards.quote_original: One clear move is worth more than ten frantic ones.

meta.selection_logic: Used when user input is blank or very short. Rotates within each primary button group to keep early results strong and varied.
notes: Chosen for stronger first-impression hit rate, cleaner share feel, and broader relevance.
